headline: Scorpene Submarine Replacement Debate Returns at RM12 Billion
context: TLDM submitted request for 2 new diesel-electric submarines to replace aging Scorpene vessels estimated at RM12 billion.

cards.big: Navy seeks RM12 billion for 2 submarines to replace aging Scorpenes
cards.sub: Controversial programme revisited as existing boats approach end of life

cards.big: KD Tunku Abdul Rahman and KD Tun Razak commissioned 2009 have 25-year life
cards.sub: Maintenance costs tripled since 2020 reaching RM450 million annually for both

cards.big: Original Scorpene procurement at RM7.3 billion linked to Altantuya case
cards.sub: French investigation found RM480 million in commissions to intermediary

cards.big: South Korea and Germany submitted proposals at RM5.5 billion each
cards.sub: Both significantly below RM12 billion estimate suggesting competitive pricing

cards.big: Submarine replacement tests whether defence procurement can avoid past corruption patterns
RM12 billion submarine debate returns. Strategic deterrence requires honest assessment of operational needs.
